methods.method_name: Ice Core Data Compilation and Analysis
methods.description: This method involves compiling and analyzing ice core data to measure SMB and δ 18 O, which are used to infer historical climate conditions. The data is used to compare with model simulations to understand the correlation between SMB, SAT, and δ 18 O.

steps.description: Use the Thomas et al. (2017) compilation for SMB data from 79 ice cores over the AIS.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch SMB data from Thomas et al. (2017) compilation

steps.description: Use the Stenni et al. (2017) compilation for δ 18 O data from 112 ice cores over the AIS.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch δ 18 O data from Stenni et al. (2017) compilation

steps.description: Correct the annual layer thickness for densification, compaction, and ice flow to produce a water equivalent snow accumulation.
steps.searchable_summary: process ice core data to correct for densification and compaction

steps.description: Calculate the annual correlation between SMB and SAT at the regional scale over 1871-2000.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate annual correlation between SMB and SAT

steps.description: Calculate the 5-yearly correlation between SMB and δ 18 O for the ice cores.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate 5-yearly correlation between SMB and δ 18 O

methods.description: This method involves reconstructing SAT data using weather station records and analyzing the correlation between SAT and SMB using model simulations.

steps.description: Use SAT records from 15 weather stations around the AIS to produce estimates of monthly gridded mean temperature anomalies.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch SAT data from weather stations

steps.description: Use a kriging technique to interpolate the SAT data between the stations.
Correlate SAT and SMB directly at the ice core locations to compare to the RACMO2.3 results.
steps.searchable_summary: correlate SAT and SMB at ice core locations

steps.description: Calculate the significance of correlations using a p value of 0.05.
steps.searchable_summary: validate correlation significance with p value
